Package com.nib.supernaut.exceptions

package com.nib.supernaut.exceptions
Exceptions for Supernaut online errors.

This package defines the exceptions thrown by the Supernaut runtime, covering error conditions related to transaction processing, resource access, and system failures.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.nib.supernaut
    Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
